prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This notice pertains specifically to the coastal access proposals under UK law that apply to England and does not include Scotland, as the legislation referenced (National Parks and Access to the Countryside Act 1949 and Marine and Coastal Access Act 2009) is applicable only to England.
